chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4620 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 21331/2023 2. For hearing of main case. 22-01-2025. Mr. Abid Feroze Advocate for Petitioner Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Learned Assistant Advocate General points out that admittedly the grievance arose to the Petitioner in the year 1982 as may also be seen in the memorandum of petition, however, the petition was filed in 2023. Learned Assistant Advocate General states that the petition is prima facie barred by laches. Learned counsel for the Petitioner remained unable to dispel the propounded bar as aforesaid. Learned Assistant Advocate General further states that the petition cannot be employed for determination of title to immovable property which in any event requires leading of evidence etc., not amenable to writ jurisdiction. In view of the aforesaid, petition is found to be misconceived and is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge Amjad PS
